title: LocalLiveEvidenceManifest
description: The redacted evidence manifest for one local-live release. It binds a git SHA, the applied migration, and the API version to a set of UAT case receipts. Each receipt carries the durable run id, the engine OCI image digest, the real provider request id, the runner mTLS enrollment record, the exactly-one canonical terminal, and a checksum over the captured canonical bundle. A credential value (or any sk- shaped token) must never appear anywhere in the manifest; the verifier fails the bundle if one does.

migration.description: the latest applied migration version, e.g. 000002_retention

image_digest.description: the engine OCI image the runner supervised — the digest-pinned receipt

provider_request_id.description: the real provider request id (e.g. chatcmpl-... live, or fake-local deterministic) — safe evidence, never the credential

mtls_enroll.description: the runner mTLS enrollment/connect audit record (runner id + issued cn), never a key

count.description: exactly one canonical terminal per case

db_assertions.description: direct DB/object assertions bound to this run id (e.g. runs.state=completed)

checksum.description: checksum over the captured canonical bundle for this case
